01 About

Code is a
people business.

I'm Prashrijan — friends call me Prash. I grew up in Nepal and now live on Sydney's Northern Beaches, where I build web applications that real people actually use. The flag pin on my lapel? Always Nepal.

My happy place is the full stack: React on the front, Node and Express behind it, MongoDB underneath. I care about the unglamorous things — clean code, scalable architecture, security that holds up — because that's what separates a demo from a product. My first launched platform, Chunaab, handles something you can't get wrong: people's votes.

Quick learner, sharp curve, allergic to "that's how we've always done it."

03 Selected Work

Built, shipped,
still running

01 — 2026

Charli's Café

Café website · Newport, Sydney · real client
  • Designed and shipped the complete web presence for a working Northern Beaches café — menu, story, hours, the lot.
  • Brought more new faces through the door: the site turns local Google searches into counter orders and table bookings.
  • Hand-built, fast-loading frontend tuned for phones — where hungry people actually browse.

02 — JAN 2025

Chunaab.com

Online voting platform · solo build
  • Secure election platform with real-time dashboards, live status updates and candidate management.
  • Tamper-proof voting backed by integrity-first backend logic and server-side automation.
  • Built-in payments — two free elections per user, then monetised.
